meaning: 贾拉拉巴德[阿富汗东部城市]
examples: The northward journey from Jalalabad was no more than 120 miles.
Northeast lies the Afghan town of Jalalabad.
The Black Hawks departed from Jalalabad thirty minutes later.
They were headed down a road that would take them to Jalalabad from Tora Bora.
"They're going to build another outpost, " Lockner told Whittaker and Ives back at Jalalabad Airfield.
